mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window or forward returns show no statistical significance (p > 0.10) during rate cuts.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.3 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions that trigger immediate equity sell-offs as recession fears materialize.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses above prior month by > 0.3pp
failure_condition: S&P 500 produces positive 5-day returns in > 55% of instances when UNRATE crosses the 0.3pp threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts indicates robust aggregate demand that sustains corporate earnings growth and drives positive equity returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive 60-day returns with an out-of-sample accuracy below 52%.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production during periods of monetary tightening signals resilient supply-side capacity that offsets higher discount rates and generates positive equity returns.
failure_condition: INDPRO growth fails to predict positive 20-day returns when FEDFUNDS increases, with a t-statistic below 1.5 over the tightening period.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPI inflation reading crossing above 3.5% forces markets to price in prolonged restrictive monetary policy, compressing equity valuations and producing negative short-term returns.
failure_condition: Forward 5-day returns remain positive in > 60% of months where CPIAUCSL crosses the 3.5% threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm payrolls combined with a stable unemployment rate indicates healthy job creation without wage-price spirals, supporting sustained corporate revenue growth and positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: The combined PAYEMS and UNRATE signal yields a negative information coefficient over any 24-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly growth in real GDP directly translates to higher corporate profit expectations, creating a persistent positive correlation with S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Rank IC for GDPC1 growth falls below 0.01 over a 5-year sample or forward returns show zero predictive power (p > 0.20).

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production during a post-shock recovery phase signals lingering supply chain constraints that suppress corporate margins and trigger immediate negative equity returns.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines fail to predict negative 5-day returns during recovery periods, with out-of-sample accuracy below 48%.
